input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.11.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

final_answer: When used, Outboard Wheel Motors and their connections must meet EV.4.1.3
